name: Sweet Onion Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dry white or red wine
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a heavy skillet.
2. Bring to boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for about 15 minutes, until vegetables are tender.
4. Season with pepper and stir in cilantro.
5. Heat tortillas in an oven.
6. Spoon the vegetable mixture onto the center of each tortilla.
7. Top each with cheese and yogurt.
8. Roll up and serve.
